candidates.row_label: Total Current Assets
candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Total other non-current assets
candidates.why: Non-current assets, not current assets.

candidates.row_label: Total Non-current Assets
candidates.why: Non-current assets, not current assets.

candidates.row_label: Profit on sales of non-current assets, used and increase of provisions and other non-cash operating items
candidates.why: Cash flow item, unrelated to current assets.

variables.notes: Direct reported total current assets line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Exact balance sheet cash line; preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow ending cash reconciles to balance sheet cash, but CHE should come from balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Beginning-of-period cash, not the balance sheet spot value for current year-end.

candidates.row_label: Profit on sales of non-current assets, used and increase of provisions and other non-cash operating items
candidates.why: Not a cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash from issue of hybrid capital
candidates.why: Financing inflow, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash from disposal of treasury shares / share buyback programme
candidates.why: Financing inflow, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash from exercise of warrants
candidates.why: Financing inflow, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Hybrid Financial Instruments (Liabilities) - Increase/Decrease - Cash-Flow
candidates.why: Financing cash flow, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash from exercise of share options
candidates.why: Financing inflow, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet cash line rather than cash flow reconciliation lines.

candidates.row_label: Total Current Liabilities
candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Interest-bearing loans and borrowings Current liabilities
candidates.why: Only current debt, not total current liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Total non-current liabilities
candidates.why: Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Direct reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: LT Debt Maturing Within 1 Year
candidates.why: Matches current portion of long-term debt and excludes lease liabilities.

variables.notes: Chose the clean current-maturity debt line. Excluded 'Current lease liability' and lease maturity rows per instruction. Did not add broader 'Interest-bearing loans and borrowings' rows to avoid double counting/ambiguity between current and non-current sections.

candidates.row_label: Income tax payable
candidates.why: Exact current taxes payable line.

variables.notes: Direct taxes payable/current tax liability line.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant and Equipment
candidates.why: Exact reported PPE total/net line; preferred over components and gross subtotals.

candidates.row_label: Property, plant and equipment under construction, incl. prepayments
candidates.why: Only a component of PPE, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Property, plant and equipment under construction, incl. prepayments - Gross
candidates.why: Gross component only, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Acc Depreciation Property, plant and equipment under construction, incl. prepayments
candidates.why: Accumulated depreciation component, not PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Total Tangible Assets, Gross
candidates.why: Would be close conceptually, but appears blank and gross rather than preferred net PPE; exact PPE line exists.

candidates.row_label: Investment in Property plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow capex line, not balance sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Disposal of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow/disposal line, not balance sheet PPE stock.

variables.notes: Used the direct PPE balance sheet line, which is preferable to gross or component rows.

candidates.row_label: Total Assets
candidates.why: Exact total assets line on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities from continuing operations
candidates.why: Exact net cash flow from operating activities line on the cash flow statement.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities from continuing operations

variables.notes: Best available operating cash flow line; statement presents continuing operations explicitly.
